Follow the light, find the wonder

15729 Madison Ave, Lakewood, OH 44107 | Tue-Sat: 12pm-8pm | (216) 999-4462 | Instagram | Facebook
Home Our Events Book Our Space Our Story Join Our List Contact Us

Upcoming Events

Join us for storytimes, author visits, and special celebrations. Each event is designed to spark imagination and foster a love of reading in children of all ages.

Saturday Story Time

Every Saturday

Drop in any Saturday for free story time! Meet other families, hear great stories, and spark imagination together.

11:00 AM → Ages 0-5
11:30 AM → Ages 6-10
Siblings welcome!
Upcoming Saturdays:
Apr 4
Apr 11 ★
Apr 18 ★
Apr 25
May 2

April 2026

Thu Apr 2

Once Upon a Dime

Thursday, April 2, 2026
During Store Hours

Celebrate Children's Book Day with us! Select books priced at just 10 cents — only on Thursday, April 2nd.

Ages All ages
Learn More & RSVP →
Fri Apr 3

Cardboard Maker's Space

Friday, April 3, 2026
6:00 PM - 8:00 PM

A night of creativity and invention! Design a robot, build an architectural structure, or create a piece of art — all out of cardboard. $12 per person for supplies.

Ages All ages
Learn More & RSVP →
Sat Apr 4
Special Event

Visit with the White Rabbit

Saturday, April 4, 2026
11:00 AM - 2:00 PM

The White Rabbit is hopping into The Wandering Lantern the day before Easter. Storytime at 11, then stick around for photos with the guest of honor from 12 to 2.

Ages All ages
Learn More & RSVP →
Sat Apr 11
Author Visit

Meet Charlotte the Perching Detective!

Saturday, April 11, 2026
11:00 AM

Charlotte the golden Cocker Spaniel is a trained detective — and she's coming to prove it. Kids hide the scent tins, she finds them every time. Author Kristine Sheppard will be here to read the book that started it all.

Ages All ages
Learn More & RSVP →
Thu Apr 16
Special Event

Camp Sunshine Kids Yoga — Earth Day Edition

Thursday, April 16, 2026
5:00 PM - 7:00 PM

Stretch, breathe, and celebrate the Earth. Jena from Camp Sunshine Kids Yoga leads two sessions — little ones at 5 PM, bigger kids at 6 — with an Earth Day twist.

Ages 1-10
Learn More & RSVP →
Fri Apr 17

Layered Paper Art Workshop with Marina Papercuts

Friday, April 17, 2026
6:00 PM - 8:00 PM

Artist Marina Papercuts guides you through creating a layered paper art piece — cutting, stacking, and building depth one sheet at a time. A hands-on evening workshop for ages 12+. $15 per person.

Ages 12+
Learn More & RSVP →
Sat Apr 18
Author Visit

Storytime with Kellie DuBay Gillis

Saturday, April 18, 2026
11:00 AM

A Fairview Park scientist who writes picture books. Two nature stories. Two days before Earth Day. Kellie DuBay Gillis is your neighbor — and she's coming to story time.

Ages All ages
Learn More & RSVP →
Tue Apr 21

Family Classics Book Club

Tuesday, April 21, 2026
6:00 PM - 7:00 PM

Join us this month for 'Winnie the Pooh' by A.A. Milne.

Ages 6-12
Learn More & RSVP →
Sat Apr 25
Special Event

Literary Cleveland Poetry Crawl

Saturday, April 25, 2026
3:30 PM - 4:00 PM

Four teen poets take over the bookstore for 30 minutes as part of Literary Cleveland's city-wide poetry crawl. Come listen, snap, and support young voices.

Ages All ages
Learn More & RSVP →
Wed Apr 29
Special Event

Silhouettes by Chris Casey

Wednesday, April 29, 2026
1:00 PM - 4:00 PM

A real silhouette artist, right here in the bookstore. Chris Casey cuts your child's profile in minutes — a keepsake that lasts forever. Book your slot ahead of time.

Ages All ages
Learn More & RSVP →

May 2026

Sat May 2
Workshop

Parent & Child Painting Class with Ohio City Art House

Saturday, May 2, 2026
12:50 PM - 2:00 PM

Grab a brush and paint alongside your little one. Ohio City Art House brings a guided painting class to The Wandering Lantern — no experience needed, just show up and create something together.

Ages 3+
Learn More & RSVP →
Tue May 19

Family Classics Book Club

Tuesday, May 19, 2026
6:00 PM - 7:00 PM

Join us this month for 'The Secret Garden' by Frances Hodgson Burnett.

Ages 6-12
Learn More & RSVP →
Thu May 21
Special Event

Camp Sunshine Kids Yoga

Thursday, May 21, 2026
5:00 PM - 7:00 PM

Two yoga sessions, one cozy bookstore. Jena from Camp Sunshine leads Parent & Tot at 5 PM and Kids Yoga at 6 — movement, music, games, and stories.

Ages 1-10
Learn More & RSVP →

Family Classics Book Club

Join us this month for 'The Wind in the Willows' by Kenneth Grahame.

Sat Mar 21
Author Visit

Meet Matthew Swinehart & Nola the Noble Corgi!

Saturday, March 21, 2026
11:00 AM & 11:30 AM

The book comes out March 10th — Nola arrives March 21st. Celebrate the brand-new release with author Matthew Swinehart and the real Nola, a certified therapy dog whose job is visiting hospital patients to bring them comfort and calm.

Ages All ages
Learn More & RSVP →
CLOSED
Tue Mar 17

Family Classics Book Club

Tuesday, March 17, 2026
6:00 PM - 7:00 PM

Join us this month for 'Pollyanna' by Eleanor H. Porter — a timeless story of optimism and joy that parents and kids can enjoy together.

Ages 6-12
Learn More & RSVP →
CLOSED
Thu Mar 12

Postcard Pen Pals

Thursday, March 12, 2026
6:00 PM - 7:00 PM

Design, color, and create a stack of one-of-a-kind postcards, then get matched with your very own pen pal to keep the letters going! A crafting and writing event for all ages. $12 per person.

Ages All ages
Learn More & RSVP →
CLOSED
Sat Mar 7

Learn to Play Chess

Saturday, March 7, 2026
2:00 PM - 4:00 PM

A free chess afternoon for kids of all ages! Learn the game, practice with other kids, and join a mini tournament if you're feeling competitive.

Ages All ages

Join Our Newsletter

Never miss a storytime, author visit, or special event. Our bi-monthly newsletter keeps you updated on upcoming events, what's next at The Wandering Lantern, and ways to be part of our community.
